full_text:
Li Xiu (Zilang) 李休 (子郎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Xiu (李休), styledZilang (子郎), was born in Possibly Hanzhong. Noted for intelligence and ability in planning, urged Zhang Lu to become a King. Li Xiu was affiliated with Zhang Lu and the Wei Kingdom.
